# Cutting Edge Landscaping & Snowplowing

> Award-winning, fully-insured landscaping, hardscaping and snow removal company serving Toronto, Etobicoke and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) since 2004. 5.0-rated with multiple HomeStars "Best of the Best" awards.

Cutting Edge Landscaping & Snowplowing designs and builds premium residential, commercial and industrial outdoor spaces, and provides rapid-response snow removal throughout the winter. The business is owned and operated by Kyle and has over 20 years of experience.

## Contact

- Phone: 416-805-7642
- Email: kyle_cuttingedge@hotmail.com
- Address: 66 Genthorn Ave, Etobicoke, ON M9W 2S9, Canada
- Website: https://cutting-edge-landscaping.ca/
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (snow removal is 24/7 during winter events)

## Service Area

Based in Etobicoke (66 Genthorn Ave), Cutting Edge serves every community within roughly a 30 km radius across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Ontario, Canada:

- Toronto & Etobicoke: Etobicoke, Rexdale, Islington, The Kingsway, Mimico, New Toronto, Long Branch, Alderwood, Humber Bay, Toronto, North York, York, East York, Weston, Downsview, Scarborough
- Peel Region: Mississauga, Brampton, Port Credit, Streetsville, Clarkson, Meadowvale, Malton, Bramalea, Caledon, Bolton
- York Region: Vaughan, Woodbridge, Kleinburg, Maple, Concord, Thornhill, Richmond Hill, King City, Markham
- Halton Region: Oakville, Milton, Georgetown

## Services

- Interlocking stone driveways, walkways and patios
- Flagstone and natural stone steps, walkways and patios
- Retaining walls (design and construction)
- Decks and fences
- Artificial turf installation
- Sodding and lawn care
- Pool and pond installation with hardscape borders
- Hot tub surround landscaping
- Property maintenance (residential and commercial)
- Snow removal and snowplowing (residential and commercial, with de-icing)

## Reputation

- 5.0 rating on Google Reviews
- HomeStars "Best of the Best" winner (2022, 2023, 2024)
- Fully insured, established 2004

## Frequently Asked Questions

- What areas do you serve? Toronto, Etobicoke and the wider GTA including Mississauga, Vaughan and Brampton.
- Do you offer snow removal? Yes — residential and commercial snowplowing, snow removal and de-icing throughout the winter.
- How long have you been in business? Since 2004, with over 20 years of experience.
- How do I get a quote? Call 416-805-7642, email kyle_cuttingedge@hotmail.com, or use the free quote form on the website. Estimates are free and no-obligation.

## Notes

- Preferred product partners include Unilock, Techo-Bloc, Permacon, Oaks, Banas Stones, Best Way Stone, Rymar Grass, In-lite and Surefoot.
